mapper.select: SELECT 'song' AS type, s.id AS id, s.name AS title, a.name AS subtitle, s.cover_url AS coverUrl, s.duration AS extra FROM tb_song s LEFT JOIN tb_artist a ON s.artist_id = a.id WHERE MATCH(s.name, s.album) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT 'artist' AS type, id AS id, name AS title, area AS subtitle, avatar AS coverUrl, introduction AS extra FROM tb_artist WHERE MATCH(name) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT 'playlist' AS type, id AS id, title AS title, style AS subtitle, cover_url AS coverUrl, introduction AS extra FROM tb_playlist WHERE MATCH(title) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN BOOLEAN MODE) LIMIT #{limit}
